publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture. Department of Forestry

did.abstract: Records include routine college and interdepartmental administrative correspondence; correspondence pertaining to commercial forestry, government regulation of forest products industries, conservation, and professional forestry associations; also, correspondence pertaining to the formal exercises at the opening of the Forestry Building at the N.Y.S. College of Agriculture (1914).

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records include routine college and interdepartmental administrative correspondence; correspondence pertaining to commercial forestry, government regulation of forest products industries, conservation, and professional forestry associations; also, correspondence pertaining to the formal exercises at the opening of the Forestry Building at the N.Y.S. College of Agriculture (1914). Included is correspondence of Alfred W. Abrams, Robert Judson Aley, Philip Wheelock Ayres, Liberty Hyde Bailey, Hugh Potter Baker, John Bentley, Jr., Robert C. Bryant, Herman Haupt Chapman, Earle Hart Clapp, John Henry Comstock, Samuel Trask Dana, Henry Sturgis Drinker, Beverly Thomas Galloway, Royal Gilkey, Jay P. Kinney, Lewis Knudson, Clyde Leavitt, Ora Miner Leland, Albert Russell Mann, Alice G. McCloskey, Franklin Frederick Moon, Veranus Alva Moore, Walter Mulford, Clyde Hadley Myers, Charles Lathrop Pack, George W. Parker, Gustav Adolph Pearson, Clifford Robert Pettis, Gifford Pinchot, James Edward Rice, P. S. Ridsdale, Howard Wait Riley, Samuel Newton Spring, William Alonzo Stocking, Jr., Charles Henry Tuck, Edward M. Tuttle, Ottomar H. Van Norden, Martha Van Rensselaer, Edward Albert White, Karl McKay Wiegand, Charles Scoon Wilson, Paul Work.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dept. of Forestry records, #20-1-287. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Forest products industry.
Forest conservation.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture. Department of Forestry

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid for Box 1 and 2.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.
